content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Extended TaskRunEntry with run_id, plan_hash, and outcome_detail fields. Added update_task_run and find_runs_for_bead methods to TaskRunLineagePort trait with FS adapter implementation. Updated record_bead_start and record_bead_completion signatures to accept and pass through the new fields. All new fields are Option<String> with serde defaults for backward compatibility with existing NDJSON data.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Extended TaskRunEntry in model.rs with three new optional fields: run_id, plan_hash, outcome_detail — all with #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if)] for backward compatibility
2. [Completed] Added update_task_run method to TaskRunLineagePort trait in service.rs — updates most recent matching entry by bead_id + project_id, setting outcome, outcome_detail, and finished_at
3. [Completed] Added find_runs_for_bead method to TaskRunLineagePort trait in service.rs — filters task runs by bead_id returning all attempts in chronological order
4. [Completed] Implemented update_task_run in FsTaskRunLineageStore (fs.rs) — reads all entries, finds last match by bead_id+project_id, updates it, rewrites file atomically
5. [Completed] Implemented find_runs_for_bead in FsTaskRunLineageStore (fs.rs) — delegates to read_task_runs and filters by bead_id
6. [Completed] Updated record_bead_start signature to accept run_id: Option<&str> and plan_hash: Option<&str>, passing them through to TaskRunEntry construction
7. [Completed] Updated record_bead_completion signature to accept run_id: Option<&str>, plan_hash: Option<&str>, and outcome_detail: Option<&str>, passing them through to TaskRunEntry construction
8. [Completed] Added service-level find_runs_for_bead and update_task_run wrapper functions for clean API access
9. [Completed] Added test: task_run_entry_serialization_with_new_fields — verifies round-trip JSON serialization of all new fields
10. [Completed] Added test: task_run_entry_backward_compat_without_new_fields — verifies old-format JSON without new fields deserializes correctly with None defaults
11. [Completed] Added test: find_runs_for_bead_filters_correctly — verifies filtering returns only matching bead entries across multiple beads and retries
12. [Completed] Added test: update_task_run_modifies_outcome — verifies in-place update of a Running entry to Succeeded with outcome_detail and finished_at
13. [Completed] Added test: multiple_retries_visible_for_same_bead — verifies two attempts (fail then succeed) for the same bead are all visible with correct plan_hash and outcome values
14. [Completed] Updated existing bead_start_and_completion_tracking test to exercise new fields (run_id, plan_hash, outcome_detail) and verify they persist correctly

## Validation Evidence

- All 60 milestone_record tests pass: cargo test --lib contexts::milestone_record (60 passed; 0 failed)
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes with zero warnings
- cargo fmt --check passes with no formatting issues
- Backward compatibility test confirms old-format NDJSON without new fields deserializes correctly (run_id, plan_hash, outcome_detail all default to None)
- find_runs_for_bead correctly returns 4 entries for bead-1 (2 attempts × start+complete), 2 for bead-2, and 0 for non-existent bead
- update_task_run correctly modifies the most recent matching entry in-place and rewrites the NDJSON file atomically

## Outstanding Risks

- update_task_run rewrites the entire task-runs.ndjson file atomically — for milestones with very large lineage files this could be slow, but is acceptable for current scale
- No callers outside tests currently pass the new fields — controller integration (bead 8.1) will need to supply run_id, plan_hash, and outcome_detail when calling record_bead_start/record_bead_completion
